prompting.responds_best_to: Clear, structured instructions with an explicit format; concise system framing.
prompting.avoid: Ambiguous prompts; relying on inferred format.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Follow the requested output format exactly and be concise.

quirks: Strong multilingual ability, especially French and other European languages
Reliable function calling and JSON output
Solid European-hosted alternative when data residency matters

handoff.output_format_instruction: Specify a strict schema or JSON mode; it adheres well.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Check edge cases and that reasoning depth matched the task; generally clean structured output.
